title: selenipedium × albopurpureum
intro: Selenipedium × albopurpureum is a hybrid orchid species, resulting from the cross-pollination of Selenipedium palmifolium and Selenipedium palmiferum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids. Selenipedium × albopurpureum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, thanks to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions or decoctions, which can be used to treat specific ailments or to promote overall well-being.
